notes: Counter-OBI strategy replicating Albers et al. 2025 (Market Maker Dilemma). OBI=(bid_size-ask_size)/(bid_size+ask_size) is instantaneous top-of-book signal (leading, unlike lagged trade-flow OFI). Counter-trade: post ASK when OBI>threshold (buy pressure), BID when OBI<-threshold (sell pressure), suppress both when balanced. vi_alpha [0.002,0.025] = 0.5-5 tick half-spread at June sigma_dollar~1.86 (tight, near-touch per paper). max_inventory reduced to 0.01 to cap directional risk. tolerance_ticks=0 (no hysteresis) so OBI signal is acted on immediately. Markout metrics (avg_markout_bps, pct_adverse_fills) in results allow direct comparison with paper Table 1.
